---
title: Callout / Admonition
status: published
---

Obsidian-style callouts use the blockquote with a leading admonition tag. We treat
them as ordinary blockquotes for round-trip purposes — the rendering layer interprets
them.

> [!note] Heads up
> This is an Obsidian-style note callout.

> [!warning] Be careful
> Nested content inside a warning callout.
>
> Multiple paragraphs are fine.
